# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Multi-Stage Deployment Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build Artifacts
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      artifact-name: build-artifacts
    steps:
      - name: Checkout source
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Prepare build output
        run: |
          mkdir -p dist/scripts
          echo "application build output" > dist/app.txt
          cat > dist/scripts/deploy.sh <<'EOF'
          #!/usr/bin/env bash
          set -euo pipefail
          echo "Deploying artifact to ${DEPLOY_ENV}"
          ls -la .
          echo "Deployment complete for ${DEPLOY_ENV}"
          EOF
          chmod +x dist/scripts/deploy.sh

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts
          path: dist/
          if-no-files-found: error
          retention-days: 7

  deploy-staging:
    name: Deploy to Staging
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    environment:
      name: staging
    steps:
      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts
          path: artifact

      - name: Make deployment scripts executable
        run: chmod +x artifact/scripts/*.sh

      - name: Execute staging deployment
        env:
          DEPLOY_ENV: staging
        run: |
          cd artifact
          ./scripts/deploy.sh

  deploy-production:
    name: Deploy to Production
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs:
      - build
      - deploy-staging
    environment:
      name: production
    steps:
      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts
          path: artifact

      - name: Make deployment scripts executable
        run: chmod +x artifact/scripts/*.sh

      - name: Execute production deployment
        env:
          DEPLOY_ENV: production
        run: |
          cd artifact
          ./scripts/deploy.sh
